name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC, Integers

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is owned by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
(* philosopher states: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: forks[i] \in 1..N \cup {-1}
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == states[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"

LeftFork(i) == i
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

FreeFork(i) == forks[i] = -1

CanEat(i) == 
  /\ FreeFork(LeftFork(i))
  /\ FreeFork(RightFork(i))

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = -1, ![RightFork(i)] = -1]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

HungryToEat(i) == 
  /\ Hungry(i)
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ TakeForks(i)

EatToThink(i) == 
  /\ Eating(i)
  /\ PutForks(i)

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N:
    (HungryToEat(i) \/ EatToThink(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ TypeOK

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i.
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number, FALSE otherwise. *)

(* The set of processes *)
Processes == 1..N

(* The type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [Processes -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [Processes -> BOOLEAN]

(* The initial state *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in Processes |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in Processes |-> FALSE]

(* The Next state relation *)
Next == \E i \in Processes :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max([num EXCEPT ![j] = 0 | j \in Processes])]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> \* except for i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices into q, count is the number of items in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = q[1..K] \* q remains unchanged
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ q[tail] = 1 \* Producer writes 1 at tail

Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ q' = q[1..K] \* q remains unchanged
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ q[head] = 0 \* Consumer reads 0 at head

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == 
  /\ TypeOK
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
        /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadRelease == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers - 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
               /\ readers = 0
               /\ writer_active' = TRUE
               /\ readers' = readers

WriteRelease == /\ writer_active = TRUE
               /\ writer_active' = FALSE
               /\ readers' = readers

Next == \/ ReadAcquire
      \/ ReadRelease
      \/ WriteAcquire
      \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> /\ TypeOK

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

(* TypeOK ensures store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Init: store is empty *)
Init == store \in [Keys -> Values] /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Next: either a Put or a Get operation *)
Next == 
  \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
    \E Put(k, v) /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ 
  \E k \in Keys :
    \E Get(k) /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, senderState

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channel \in 0..CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ senderState \in {"Idle", "Transmitting", "WaitingAck", "Done", "Failed"}

Init ==
    /\ file = 1
    /\ chunks = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = 0
    /\ senderState = "Idle"

SendChunk ==
    /\ senderState = "Idle"
    /\ channel = 0
    /\ senderState' = "Transmitting"
    /\ channel' = chunks
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED << retransmitCount, channel, senderState >>

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ senderState = "Transmitting"
    /\ channel = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ senderState' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ channel' = 0
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ UNCHANGED << retransmitCount, channel, senderState >>

AckReceived ==
    /\ senderState = "WaitingAck"
    /\ channel = 0
    /\ senderState' = "Idle"
    /\ file' = file + CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ chunks' = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED << channel, senderState >>

Retransmit ==
    /\ senderState = "WaitingAck"
    /\ channel = 0
    /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ senderState' = "Transmitting"
    /\ channel' = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ UNCHANGED << channel, senderState >>

GiveUp ==
    /\ senderState = "WaitingAck"
    /\ channel = 0
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ senderState' = "Failed"
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ UNCHANGED << channel, senderState >>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ AckReceived
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<< file, chunks, retransmitCount, channel, senderState >>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES data, txns, snapshots, nextTxId, aborts, commits, transaction
TxBegin == [id: TxId, state: "begin", writes: <<>>]
TxCommit == [id: TxId, state: "commit", writes: <<>>]
TxAbort == [id: TxId, state: "abort", writes: <<>>]

\* Transaction ID type
TxId == Nat

\* Record type
Record == [id: Nat, fields: <<>>]

\* Snapshot type
Snapshot == Seq(Record)

\* Type OK invariant
TypeOK == /\ data \in Snapshot
        /\ txns \in Seq(TxBegin \cup TxCommit \cup TxAbort)
        /\ snapshots \in [TxId -> Snapshot]
        /\ nextTxId \in Nat
        /\ aborts \in SUBSET TxId
        /\ commits \in SUBSET TxId
        /\ aborts \subseteq nextTxId
        /\ commits \subseteq nextTxId
        /\ aborts \cap commits = {}

\* Begin a new transaction
BeginTx == /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
          /\ txns' = Append(txns, TxBegin[nextTxId'])
          /\ snapshots' = [snapshots EXCEPT ![nextTxId'] = data]
          /\ aborts' = aborts
          /\ commits' = commits
          /\ data' = data

\* Read operation: returns the snapshot of the transaction
ReadTx(txId) == snapshots[txId]

\* Write operation: appends a write to the transaction's write set
WriteTx(txId, rec) == /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [txns[txId] EXCEPT ![writes] = Append(txns[txId][writes], rec)]]
          /\ data' = data
          /\ snapshots' = snapshots
          /\ aborts' = aborts
          /\ commits' = commits
          /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId

\* Commit a transaction: check for write-write conflicts
CommitTx(txId) == /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = TxCommit[txId]]
          /\ aborts' = aborts
          /\ commits' = commits \cup {txId}
          /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId
          /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![txns[txId][writes]] = Append(data[txns[txId][writes]], <<>>)] \* Simplified: no actual conflict detection
          /\ snapshots' = snapshots

\* Abort a transaction
AbortTx(txId) == /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = TxAbort[txId]]
          /\ aborts' = aborts \cup {txId}
          /\ commits' = commits
          /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId
          /\ data' = data
          /\ snapshots' = snapshots

\* Next state: either begin a new transaction, read, write, commit, or abort
Next == \/ BeginTx
      \/ /\ txId \in nextTxId
         /\ ReadTx(txId)
      \/ /\ txId \in nextTxId
         /\ rec \in Snapshot
         /\ WriteTx(txId, rec)
      \/ /\ txId \in nextTxId
         /\ CommitTx(txId)
      \/ /\ txId \in nextTxId
         /\ AbortTx(txId)

\* Initial state
Init == /\ data = <<>>
        /\ txns = <<>>
        /\ snapshots = [][]
        /\ nextTxId = 0
        /\ aborts = {}
        /\ commits = {}

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, snapshots, nextTxId, aborts, commits>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Integers
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon, node

(* TypeOK ensures clocks is a function from node identifiers to integers,
   and epsilon is a non-negative integer. *)
TypeOK == clocks \in [1..N -> Int] /\ epsilon \in Nat

(* Drift modelled as integer offset: each node's clock may drift by at most
   +/- drift per round. *)
drift == 1

(* Init: all clocks start at 0, epsilon is given. *)
Init == clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ epsilon \in Nat

(* Average-based sync: each node updates its clock to the average of all
   clocks it receives, plus its own drift. *)
AvgSync == /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
          (SUM j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j]) \div N + drift]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon

(* Next: either clocks stay the same (no sync), or they perform AvgSync. *)
Next == clocks' = clocks /\ epsilon' = epsilon \/ AvgSync

(* Spec: the system starts in Init and evolves according to Next. *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a sequence of booleans of length 2 *)
TypeOK == /\ flag \in Seq(2)
          /\ turn \in 1..2

Init == /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
       /\ turn \in 1..2

Next == \/ /\ flag' = <<TRUE, flag[2]>>
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
       \/ /\ flag' = <<flag[1], TRUE>>
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       \/ /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES known, infected

(* known: a function mapping each node to the set of nodes it knows about *)
(* infected: a function mapping each node to the set of nodes it has infected *)

(* The set of all nodes *)
Nodes == 1..N

(* The set of all possible updates *)
Updates == 1..U

(* The set of all possible messages *)
Messages == { [sender: Nodes, update: Updates] }

(* The set of all possible states *)
State == [ known: [Nodes -> [Nodes -> BOOLEAN]],
           infected: [Nodes -> [Nodes -> BOOLEAN]] ]

(* The initial state: each node knows only itself and is infected only itself *)
Init == /\ known = [ n \in Nodes |-> [ m \in Nodes |-> (m = n) ]]
       /\ infected = [ n \in Nodes |-> [ m \in Nodes |-> (m = n) ]]

(* The next-state relation: each node sends updates to all nodes it knows about *)
SendUpdates(n) == [ m \in Nodes |-> [ u \in Updates |-> (known[n][m] /\ (infected[n][u] \/ (m = n /\ u = n))) ]]

(* The next-state relation: each node receives updates from all nodes it knows about *)
ReceiveUpdates(n) == [ m \in Nodes |-> [ u \in Updates |-> (known[n][m] /\ (infected[m][u] \/ (m = n /\ u = n))) ]]

(* The next-state relation: each node updates its known and infected sets *)
NextKnown(n) == [ m \in Nodes |-> [ u \in Updates |-> (known[n][m] \/ (known[m][n] /\ (infected[n][u] \/ (m = n /\ u = n)))) ]]

NextInfected(n) == [ m \in Nodes |-> [ u \in Updates |-> (infected[n][u] \/ (known[n][m] /\ (infected[m][u] \/ (m = n /\ u = n)))) ]]

(* The next-state relation: each node updates its known and infected sets *)
Next(n) == [ known' = [ k \in Nodes |-> NextKnown(k) ],
             infected' = [ k \in Nodes |-> NextInfected(k) ] ]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts, node

(* Node identifiers *)
CONSTANTS Node

(* Type OK invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]

(* Initial state: all counts zero *)
Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation: node n increments its own counter *)
Increment(n) == /\ n \in Node
                /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

(* Merge operation: node n merges its counter with node m *)
Merge(n, m) == /\ n, m \in Node
               /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]]
               /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

(* Next-state relation: either increment or merge *)
Next == \E n \in Node: Increment(n)
      \/ \E n, m \in Node: Merge(n, m)

(* Global count: sum over max of each node's counters *)
GlobalCount == \A n \in Node: Max(counts[][n])
TotalCount == \Sum n \in Node: GlobalCount[n]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
